footer.tagline: A QR + contactless discount card to save at partner merchants.

hero.title: One card. Discounts across town.
hero.subtitle: With SmartCard, get discounts at partner restaurants, shops and services. Show your card, the discount applies. No complicated app.

problem.title: Saving should not be complicated
problem.subtitle: Good deals are often scattered. We bring discounts together in one place.
problem.card1Body: Hard to know where the discount is, at the right time.
problem.card2Body: Every store has its own card. You end up forgetting them.
problem.card3Body: No need to install a new app for every benefit.

solution.title: SmartCard brings discounts into one simple gesture
solution.subtitle: A simple card to show, to save at multiple partner merchants.
solution.bullet2: Simple use: scan the QR (or contactless tap)

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Body: Create your account and preorder online.
howItWorks.step2Body: At a partner merchant, present your card.
howItWorks.step3Body: The merchant scans the QR (or contactless) and your discount applies.

benefits.title: Why you'll love it
benefits.subtitle: Simple to use, real savings every day.
benefits.b1Body: Discounts on categories you already use.

trust.title: Built for Burkina Faso
trust.subtitle: Clear, simple, mobile-friendly, even on average connections.

preorder.title: Preorder your card
preorder.subtitle: Be among the first and get the launch price.
preorder.note: You can track your preorder in your dashboard.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions.
faq.q1: Do I need Internet to use the card?
faq.a1: No. You show the card and the discount is applied at checkout. Internet is only useful to view the partner list.
faq.a2: No. The card works on its own. Your account helps you manage your preorder and access the partner list.
faq.a3: At partner merchants. The list is updated regularly in your space.
faq.q4: What if I lose my card?
faq.a4: You can deactivate it and request a replacement. Your QR can also be retrieved from your account.
faq.a5: Create an account, then confirm the quantity. That's it.

finalCta.title: Ready to save every day?
finalCta.subtitle: Preorder your SmartCard and start enjoying discounts at launch.

dashboard.title: Hi, {name}
dashboard.subtitle: Track your preorders and find helpful info here.
dashboard.cardStatusBodyReserved: Preorder received. Your card will be prepared for the next batch.
dashboard.cardStatusBodyNotOrdered: Preorder your card to reserve your spot for launch.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.body: Preorder your card to get started.

howToUse.title: How to use the card
howToUse.s2: The merchant scans the QR (or taps contactless).

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your account and preorders.
